directional_summary.interpretation: Primary shell-axis candidates favor magic-N more than magic-Z, but magic subsets are sparse and the result remains sandbox-only.

candidate_items.name: Proton-axis Gaussian shell proximity
limitations: Magic-axis subsets are sparse and retrospective.
Candidate coefficients are fit on the 11-row NMD-0002 residual slice.
Output is sandbox-only and does not promote a claim.

candidate_items.name: Sign-inverted proton-axis Gaussian control
candidate_items.formula: r_corr = -beta_z * s_z2, with beta_z fit as in FULLKNOWN-SHELL-001
limitations: Magic-axis subsets are sparse and retrospective.
Candidate coefficients are fit on the 11-row NMD-0002 residual slice.
Output is sandbox-only and does not promote a claim.

candidate_items.name: Shuffled proton-axis Gaussian control (cyclic-shift-5)
candidate_items.formula: r_corr = beta_z * s_z2_perm where row i uses (i+5) mod N feature
limitations: Magic-axis subsets are sparse and retrospective.
Candidate coefficients are fit on the 11-row NMD-0002 residual slice.
Output is sandbox-only and does not promote a claim.

promotion_boundary.required_next_step: Maintainer review before any registry expansion, reveal scoring, RESULT-* artifact, claim, or knowledge update.

limitations: Sandbox-only retrospective audit; no prediction registry, canonical result, claim, or knowledge artifact is updated.
Magic-N, magic-Z, and double-magic subsets are sparse and cannot carry standalone conclusions.
Matched controls are deterministic A-nearest non-magic diagnostics, not causal controls.
All coefficients are fit on the 11-row NMD-0002 residual slice.
The full-known surface is committed repository data; this is not a future-measurement reveal.
